name: danmaku-deep
description: Deep danmaku mine — fetch ALL danmaku (up to 5000/video) from the top 500 highest-replyCount corpus videos, parse via Python XML parser, harvest as high-weight evidence
note: Danmaku evidence is weighted 2× in harvesting because real-time reactions have higher signal for emotional/absolute language. Each video's danmaku saved as {bvid}.json.
